parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Workspace numeric identifier. If omitted, lists compute environments in a user context.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional attribute values to include in the response. Accepts `labels` or `resources`. Returns `null` for omitted attributes.

items.description: Optional compute environment response enrichment attribute. Accepts `labels` or `resources`.
items.title: ComputeEnvQueryAttribute
